PR title must follow Conventional Commits, e.g. "feat: add camera snapshot button"
(it becomes the squash-merge commit and drives the next release). See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## How it was tested

<!-- Unit tests, the e2e harness, manual steps against a Signal K server. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title is a Conventional Commit (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, ...)
- [ ] `npm run format:check`, `npm run lint`, `npm run build`, `npm test` all pass
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] No secrets or real camera addresses in the code, tests, or fixtures
